STprocpoisson 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Border Map of Maranhão State, Brazil

Source: R/MA.R
MA.Rd

The MA dataset provides spatial data representing the border of Maranhão state, Brazil. It is useful for spatial analyses and modeling in combination with other data from the STprocpoisson package. This dataset serves as a geographical base map.

data(MA)

Format

An sf object with the following details:

geometry

A polygon representing the boundary of Maranhão.

CRS

The coordinate reference system is EPSG:4326 (WGS84).

Source

Official cartographic data from Brazilian government agencies.

Examples

library(STprocpoisson)
data(MA)
plot(MA, main = "Maranhão State Border")
